title: styloma lanigera
intro: Styloma lanigera, also known as Styloma lanigerum, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka and India. The medicinal properties of Styloma lanigera lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and promoting digestion.
